[[reply_to_current]] Quick reminder: this is a chat-memory rollup checkpoint. If today’s work might matter later, it’s a good time to: - update `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` - rebuild the chat index with `python3 scripts/session_memory.py build-index --days 14 --limit 20` - refresh `MEMORY.md` with any durable lessons or preferences And if you’re resuming an older project later, check `memory/chat-index.md` first and use: - `python3 scripts/session_memory.py project "<topic>"` before guessing from memory.
